steps.title: Use the contrast in meaning
steps.content: The text says some features can help with the effect of unnatural aspects of a robot's appearance, but a robot that looks too human can unsettle people. The blank must mean to reduce or improve that negative effect.

steps.title: Match the needed verb
steps.content: Choice B means to combine or merge, which does not fit the object "the effect." Choice C means to increase, the opposite of the intended meaning. Choice D means to support with evidence, which is unrelated. The remaining word means to make something less severe or better, exactly matching the context. The answer is A.
